$comment: Budget-app screenshot traversal + Tier-2 outcome assertion. Generates qa/flows/mobile.yaml (scripts/qa/compile-flow.mjs); never hand-edit the yaml. Anchors live in qa/selectors.json and target the seeded budget (src/qa/fixtures.ts). The core action pinned here is ADDING AN EXPENSE: a noted transaction is absent on the home list before save and present after (assertNot -> add expense -> type amount on the keypad -> note -> save -> assert), proving the write + balance/chart refresh landed.
